seo.title: Setu Queue — QSR Counter Service & Order Pickup Display | Token Management
seo.description: Setu Queue is counter service software for quick service restaurants — counter billing, token generation, kitchen routing and customer pickup display. Built for QSRs, food courts and canteens.

hero.headline: QSR counter service, sorted
hero.subheadline: Counter billing, token management, kitchen routing and customer pickup display — built for quick service restaurants, food courts and canteens where speed is everything.

showcase.headline: One system, from counter to pickup
showcase.subtext: Scroll through what's actually running under the hood — built around how a real counter shift moves, from the order to the pickup screen.

features.heading: Counter billing
features.body: Fast, accurate billing at the counter — GST applied automatically on every order.

features.heading: Token generation
features.body: Every order gets a unique token number, printed or displayed instantly at billing.

features.heading: Kitchen routing
features.body: Orders route instantly to the kitchen the moment billing is confirmed — no shouting, no paper slips.

features.heading: Pickup display
features.body: A customer-facing screen shows token numbers as orders move from preparing to ready for collection.

features.heading: Payment
features.body: Cash, card and UPI — all reconciled automatically against every order.

features.heading: Dashboard
features.body: Sales, orders and queue performance visible in real time — no manual exports needed.

features.heading: Tax engine
features.body: GST applied automatically based on order type. No manual rate selection at the counter.

features.heading: Role management
features.body: Counter staff, kitchen staff and managers each get exactly the access they need.

steps.title: Customer orders
steps.body: Staff takes the order at the counter and confirms billing. Token number generated instantly.

steps.title: Kitchen notified
steps.body: Order routes digitally to the kitchen the moment billing is confirmed — with all items and modifications intact.

steps.title: Pickup display updates
steps.body: When the kitchen marks the order ready, the customer's token number moves to the "Ready" column on the display screen.

comparison.headline: Not sure which Setu product is right for you?

columns.name: Setu Queue
columns.customerExperience: Order at counter, wait for pickup

comparison.footnote: If your customers sit down and a staff member serves them — Setu Dine is built for you. If your customers order at the counter and collect their food — Setu Queue is built for you.

items.question: What is Setu Queue?
items.answer: Setu Queue is a counter service system built for quick service restaurants, food courts and canteens. It handles counter billing, token generation, kitchen order routing and a customer-facing pickup display — all in one system.

items.question: How does token management work in Setu Queue?
items.answer: When a customer places an order at the counter, Setu Queue generates a unique token number automatically. That number appears on the customer's receipt and on the pickup display screen, which updates in real time as their order moves from preparing to ready.

items.question: Is Setu Queue GST compliant?
items.answer: Yes. Setu Queue has a built-in tax engine that applies GST automatically on every order — no manual rate selection required at the counter.

items.question: What is the customer pickup display?
items.answer: The pickup display is a screen (typically mounted where customers wait) that shows token numbers in two columns: Preparing and Ready. When the kitchen marks an order complete, the token number moves to Ready automatically.

items.question: What is the difference between Setu Queue and Setu Dine?
items.answer: Setu Queue is built for counter-service restaurants where customers order at the counter and wait for their number to be called. Setu Dine is built for table-service restaurants where customers sit down and a staff member takes their order. They serve different restaurant models — you choose the one that matches how your restaurant operates.

items.question: What payment methods does Setu Queue support?
items.answer: Setu Queue accepts cash, cards and UPI. All payments are reconciled automatically against every order.

items.question: Is there a demo available?
items.answer: Yes. Book a free 30-minute demo and we'll walk through counter billing, token flow and the pickup display for your setup.

cta.headline: See Setu Queue running in your restaurant
cta.subtext: Book a free 30-minute demo and we'll walk through counter billing, token flow and the pickup display for your setup.
